name: Shelf bracket
alternativeNames: Shelf brace, triangular bracket, cantilever shelf support, wall shelf bracket
description: Right-triangle shelf support: vertical wall leg, horizontal shelf leg at the top, and a diagonal brace running from the foot of the wall leg up to the tip of the shelf leg. With the lightening cutout on, the bracket prints as a three-bar frame (wall + shelf + brace). Print on its side (one triangular face on the bed) so layer lines run along the load path — the bracket width becomes the print height.

parameters.label: Wall leg height
parameters.description: Height of the vertical leg that screws to the wall (along Z). Taller wall legs spread mounting forces over more screws and reduce wall-anchor pull-out.

parameters.label: Shelf leg length
parameters.description: Length of the horizontal leg the shelf board rests on (along X, from the wall outward). Often slightly less than the shelf board depth so the bracket is hidden.

parameters.label: Bracket width
parameters.description: Depth of the bracket along Y — how thick the bracket appears when viewed from the front. Becomes the print height when laid flat on the side. Wider = stiffer but uses more filament and prints taller.

parameters.label: Leg / brace thickness
parameters.description: Wall thickness of the wall leg, shelf leg, and diagonal brace (all three share one thickness so the frame prints evenly). Opinionated: a separate brace thickness is not exposed because mismatched bar thicknesses create stress concentrations at the joints.

parameters.label: Bracket style
parameters.description: Triangular = full diagonal brace from the foot of the wall leg to the tip of the shelf leg (load-bearing). L-shaped = no brace, just the two legs (light loads only).

parameters.label: Lightening cutout in brace
parameters.description: Removes the inner triangle between the three bars so the bracket prints as an open frame — saves filament with little stiffness loss (the three perimeter bars carry the load). Disable for maximum strength or a solid-infill aesthetic. Ignored when style = L-shaped.

parameters.label: Hole diameter
parameters.description: Used when "Custom" bolt size is selected in the mounting section. Same diameter for wall and shelf holes.

parameters.label: Wall mounting holes
parameters.description: Through-holes along the wall leg for screws into the wall (drywall anchors, masonry plugs, or studs). Placed below the shelf leg so screw heads sit flush against the wall.

parameters.label: Shelf mounting holes
parameters.description: Through-holes down through the shelf leg for screws into the underside of the shelf board. Set 0 to omit (rely on the shelf's weight or tape/adhesive).

parameters.label: Hole edge offset
parameters.description: Inset from each leg's free end for the first/last hole centre (also used as the wall-side inset on the shelf leg).

parameters.label: Countersink wall holes
parameters.description: Conical recess on the wall-facing side of the wall leg so flat-head screw heads sit flush against the wall. Countersink angle follows bolt preset (90° metric, 82° UNC).

parameters.label: Screw-access slots through brace
parameters.description: Adds a small vertical slot through the brace web above each shelf-leg hole so a screwdriver can reach through to drive the shelf screw. Only has an effect when the bracket is triangular AND the lightening cutout is off (otherwise the brace is already an open frame).

parameters.label: Access slot diameter
parameters.description: Diameter of the screwdriver clearance slot through the brace. Size for the screwdriver shaft + a few mm clearance, not the screw head.

parameters.label: Slotted wall holes
parameters.description: Elongate wall mounting holes vertically (along Z) for height adjustment when fitting to existing screws or levelling on uneven walls.

parameters.label: Extra slot length
parameters.description: Added vertical slot length (mm) beyond the bolt clearance diameter on the wall leg.

parameters.label: Minimum hole-to-edge
parameters.description: Keeps hole centres away from leg edges and from the brace, so holes cannot break out and screws cannot foul the brace web.

parameters.label: XY hole compensation
parameters.description: Extra radius on holes for printer tolerance (subtract from nominal).
